title: Justice Department is prepping probe of Adobe's $20 billion acquisition of Figma: report
text: The Justice Department is preparing an investigation of Adobe Inc.'s ADBE, -4.12% $20 billion acquisition of Figma, a collaborative web application for interface design, according to a report Thursday in Politico, citing people familiar with the matter and access to a document. Justice officials have issued civil investigative demands requesting information on the deal, Politico reported.

title: Adobe's $20 billion Figma merger reportedly facing DOJ scrutiny
text: Adobe Inc.'s ADBE, -4.68% plans to purchase fellow creative-software company Figma have drawn the attention of regulators at the Department of Justice, according to reports from late Wednesday. Politico reported that the Justice Department was planning to open an in-depth investigation of the $20 billion deal, citing four unnamed sources.
